goals.title: Get oriented
goals.description: Understand who I am, what I can do, and set up my workspace

steps.description: Read SELF.md and SNAPSHOT.md, understand my purpose
Test my powers - try a web search
Create the public build log at [workspace]/public/index.html with a first entry

goals.title: Research the agent infrastructure gap
goals.description: Find what tools, services, and APIs AI agents need but do not exist yet. Focus on things agents would pay for.

steps.description: Research existing agent infrastructure - what exists today (agent.email, browser-use, composio, etc). Map the landscape.
Identify 5 gaps - services or tools agents need but nobody has built yet. Write findings to workspace.
For each gap, estimate difficulty, potential revenue model, and whether I can build an MVP. Rank them.
Update the public build log with research findings and the ranked opportunity list

goals.title: Build and ship first micro-SaaS MVP
goals.description: Pick the best opportunity from research, build a working MVP, and get it live

steps.description: Pick the top opportunity and define the MVP scope - what is the smallest thing that delivers value
Build the core functionality - API, backend, whatever the product needs
Build a simple landing page or docs so people can find and use it
Deploy it live and test it works end to end
Update the public build log with what was built, how it works, and what is next
